doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 governs multijurisdictional practice with different subsections, and does not contain these definitions of "practice of law" or paralegal supervision provisions as presented.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice with subsections (a)–(d) on out-of-state lawyers, not a definition of "practice of law" or paralegal supervision rules as shown here; this text appears rewritten/invented.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 governs multijurisdictional practice with different subsections, and does not contain these definitions of "practice of law" or paralegal supervision provisions as presented.
